nasb.text: then he took his kinsmen with him and pursued him a distance of seven days’ journey, and he overtook him in the hill country of Gilead.

esv.text: he took his kinsmen with him and pursued him for seven days and followed close after him into the hill country of Gilead.

cnv.text: 拉班就帶著自己的眾兄弟追趕他，追了七日的路程，才在基列山把他們追上了。

ccb.text: 于是，他带着族人去追赶，追了七天，在基列山区追上了雅各。

csbs.text: 拉班就带着自己的兄弟们追赶雅各，追了七天的路程，在基列山追上了他。
